top_findings.name: timothywarner-org/claude-architect
top_findings.description: Study materials, code examples, and practice scenarios for Anthropic's Claude Certified Architect: Foundations (CCA-F) certification exam. Covers all five exam domains: agentic architecture, MCP integration, Claude Code workflows, prompt engineering, and context management.
